summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Depends SCA Scanner MVP. All backend APIs working perfectly, frontend navigation and UI components functional. Authentication flow tested successfully.

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts display but show dimension warnings
Missing Description warning for DialogContent accessibility

passed_tests: Backend scans endpoints: POST /api/scans/trigger, GET /api/scans, GET /api/scans/{id}, GET /api/scans/project/{id}
Login page loads with Google OAuth button
Frontend navigation works: Dashboard, Projects, Scans, Settings pages
Project creation form works with all fields and scan type checkboxes
Authentication flow with test session successful
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
